prompt: I want to test HSM archive with 4 concurrent copytools writing large files

assertions.name: skips_interview
assertions.description: Does not ask clarifying questions — goes straight to collection

assertions.name: collects_from_mds
assertions.description: Runs collector with filter that includes MDS node

assertions.name: mentions_max_requests
assertions.description: Surfaces HSM max_requests and relates it to the 4 concurrent copytools

assertions.name: uses_tables
assertions.description: Presents data in structured tables, not prose

assertions.name: layer1_only
assertions.description: Presents only 2-4 critical facts, not a full parameter dump
